author: PC Gamer
text:
No, Eric Barone is not adding infidelity to Stardew Valley, although he did briefly consider letting you ruin marriages, to Grandpa's deep disappointment
Some idle musing about the nature of morality in sandbox games has spiraled out of control.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Capcom says it's eyeing Devil May Cry, Ace Attorney, Dragon's Dogma for 'sequels, remakes, ports, etc.', and I'll gladly take the excuse to get my hopes up
Dragon's Dogma mentioned!

author: PC Gamer
text:
Doom is 10 years old today, and you can pick it up for just $2 on Steam
This is not a deal to be missed.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Bungie is turning Marathon's loot dial to 11 ahead of its first wipe, opening up Cryo Archive 24/7
The time has come to actually use all the good stuff in your vault.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Turn-based tactics game Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus 2 will release next week to coincide with a Warhammer Skulls event stacked with reveals
Some of them will be grim. Some of them will be dark.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Subnautica 2 devs say it's 'bigger and more polished' than any of the studio's previous early access launches
Unknown Worlds is eager to collaborate with its community once again.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Ubisoft's leak-a-thon continues with a dump of Assassin's Creed Hexe info that hints at the return of a familiar 'old man'
Sadly, there's no hint at a release date in the leak.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Intel is back in F1 as it officially partners with last year's winners McLaren to provide the team with heaps of chips
Gotta go fast.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Overwatch's OG mode has made me realise how far this game has come and how good we have it right now
Why is everything and everyone so bloody slow?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Netflix misspells the name of Devil May Cry antagonist Vergil on a t-shirt, and it's honestly one of the more understandable typos they could've made
You say Vergil, I say Virgil, you say tomato, I say…

author: PC Gamer
text:
The US has approved the sale of Nvidia H200 chips to 10 Chinese firms, but sources say they're still waiting for the go-ahead from China itself
Nvidia said it had 0% market share in China mere months ago.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Forza Horizon 6 launch times and release date in your region
The Horizon Festival's going to Japan, finally.

author: PC Gamer
text:
AMD bringing FSR 4.1 ML-powered upscaling to RX 7000-series in July, RX 6000-series in 2027
Modders and Sony proved it possible. Now AMD is making good with official support.

author: PC Gamer
text:
IO Interactive has forgiven me for calling 007 a smug tool
I am absolved of my sins until at least my next article.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Summer Game Fest 2026 schedule and all the other summer showcases full of gaming announcements you won't want to miss
Keep up with when to watch this summer's lineup of major gaming announcements.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Amazon reportedly had a studio pivot away from a game 'everyone was excited by' to make something with more AI stuffed in it, then laid them all off anyway
Beyond parody.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The PC Gaming Show returns with both new and familiar faces to host our summer look at some of the coolest upcoming games
Four, count 'em, four, great hosts.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'Bambu Labs, go f*** yourself': 3D printing company currently under fire for reportedly blocking 3rd parties from its software, legal threats and drama aplenty
How open is open source code, really?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Even if you have an RTX 5090, I don't recommend using ray tracing in Forza Horizon 6. Not because of the performance hit, simply because it's just not worth using
If I'm going to burn off some fps, then give my eyes something to go dizzy over.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Forza Horizon 6 PC performance analysis: Heavy on your CPU, with uninspiring ray tracing, but at least it all runs very nicely
From handhelds to old gaming PCs, pretty much anything will run the new Forza.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Forza Horizon 6 review
Riding a well-worn track.

author: PC Gamer
text:
AOC's new 34-inch gaming monitor gets the same sizzling 5th Gen QD-OLED panel tech as our current favorite ultrawide but it's a whole lot cheaper
Still not exactly a bargain, but at least it's not sold out.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'It's Temu Google Stadia': Vtuber showcases backseat gaming tool while playing Dark Souls 2 for the very first time
Strap in.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Intel is back in F1 as it officially partners with last year's winners McLaren to provide the team with heaps of chips
Gotta go fast.

author: PC Gamer
text:

author: PC Gamer
text:
The US has approved the sale of Nvidia H200 chips to 10 Chinese firms, but sources say they're still waiting for the go-ahead from China itself
Nvidia said it had 0% market share in China mere months ago.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Forza Horizon 6 launch times and release date in your region
The Horizon Festival's going to Japan, finally.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Marvel Rivals has added a literal T. rex to the game alongside nerfing some Strategists and I don't know what's more surprising
It can't see you if you stay completely still.

author: PC Gamer
text:
While I can barely find two sticks of 16 GB to rub together, Micron unveils a 256 GB memory module destined for AI servers
The module is apparently "capable of speeds up to 9,200 megatransfers per second."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Grand Theft Auto 6 leak says preorders begin next week
An errant Best Buy email sent to multiple content creators and influencers may have blown the big surprise.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The latest Nvidia drivers reportedly fix stutters when using frame generation and VSync, so you can generate to your heart's content
Capcom games seem among the biggest beneficiaries.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Subnautica 2 pulls over 370,000 concurrent players in its first 30 minutes on Steam as it cannonballs into early access
We might need a bigger ocean.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'It nearly killed me': Why studio head James Ohlen left sci-fi RPG Exodus mid-development—and why EA crushing his Star Wars: The Old Republic reboot was the 'beginning of the end' at BioWare
"I just needed to step away."

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to digest food in Subnautica 2
Can't figure out how to solve "digestive incompatibility" in Subnautica 2? Here's how to deal with your tummy troubles.

author: PC Gamer
text:
AMD now owns 38.1% of the overall x86 CPU market according to new research but actually lost ground in desktop PCs
The CPU market giveth, and the CPU market taketh away...

author: PC Gamer
text:
Control was destined to become an RPG franchise all along, says creative director: 'That's how Control was born'
News to me, but I suppose non-Euclidean geometric brutalist Rome wasn't built in a day.

author: PC Gamer
text:
University graduate speaker met with boos for saying AI 'is the next industrial revolution, then cheers for saying 'only a few years ago, AI was not a factor in our lives'
You're saying boo-urns, right?

author: PC Gamer
text:
How Subnautica 2 multiplayer works
Co-op features are a bit lacking, but hopefully that will change in early access.

author: PC Gamer
text:
In Subnautica 2, survival is a prison and humanity might be better off becoming something else
It's not the only 2020s sci-fi wondering whether being "inhuman" is really so bad.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Turn down these five Subnautica 2 settings from Epic to High for a massive frame rate boost
Hello Lumen my old friend.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get silver in Subnautica 2
Scrounge up some shiny silver to craft a better air tank.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get the Sonic Resonator and mine in Subnautica 2
The 'unknown tool' you need is a deep-sea jackhammer.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get Acidic Raion Pouch in Subnautica 2
This brain-like worm colony makes for a good battery, apparently.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to build a base in Subnautica 2
Unlock the Habitat Builder to start your undersea outpost.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get quartz in Subnautica 2
One of the most basic crafting materials.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to increase inventory size in Subnautica 2
Find these Biobed locations to haul more materials across the ocean.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The best Subnautica 2 base locations
Where to build your undersea HQ.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get salt in Subnautica 2
Build a Power Cell, but also some delicious jerky.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get gold in Subnautica 2
Fabricate Advanced Wiring Kits or Strong Acid with this material.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get Strong Acid in Subnautica 2
Harvest Necrolei Cysts to craft this Power Cell component.

author: PC Gamer
text:
I've spent over 30 hours in Subnautica 2—here are my top 20 quick tips to get started under the sea
Adjust to your new underwater life and avoid getting chomped.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to increase O2 in Subnautica 2
Expand your oxygen capacity so you can dive deeper.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get fibrous pulp in Subnautica 2
Hiding in plain sight.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get lithium in Subnautica 2
You'll need this material to acquire the High Capacity Air Tank.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get lead in Subnautica 2
Find this metal to craft the Sonic Resonator.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get the Wakemaker in Subnautica 2
All the Wakemaker parts you can scan to unlock this speedy gadget.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to build rooms in Subnautica 2
Too many corridors.

author: PC Gamer
text:
It took a while, but Overwatch's iconic heroes have finally been bitten by the collab slop curse
Tracer, Mercy, D.Va, and Genji are now Fortnite skins.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Total War: Warhammer 3 pushes the giant tiger people button next week
Grand Cathay players can soon command Bhashiva and the Tiger Warriors.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Party Animals studio sparks fury with 'AI video contest,' apologizes, then makes things even worse by asking if it should hold the contest anyway
Fair to say that this didn't go as Recreate Games expected it to.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Subnautica 2 console commands: turn on god mode, unlock all blueprints, craft without resources, and change your FOV
Modders have already unlocked Subnautica 2's debug console to allow you to use cheats.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Garry Newman acknowledges Gmod successor S&box had a bumpy launch, but is baffled by the number of people complaining about NFTs, which aren't in the game: 'I have no idea what this s**t is about'
"It's a UGC platform, there is always going to be dog sh*t."

author: PC Gamer
text:
After all that drama, Subnautica 2 is good
The early access survival game has emerged from the deep dark cave of corporate shenanigans it was stuck in, and it's a lot of fun.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The story trailer for Remothered: Red Nun's Legacy, an upcoming survival horror game, reveals more of the twisted location and odd inhabitants
What happened at the Ashmann residence? Nun of your business.

text:

author: PC Gamer
text:
The original Doom soundtrack joins 'our national playlist' in the US Library of Congress
Bobby Prince's groundbreaking soundtrack is one of 25 recordings inducted into the famed Library of Congress today.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Subnautica 2 sells 1 million copies in its first hour, and I have to imagine the CEO of Krafton is pouring himself a very stiff drink right about now
The scenario that Krafton humiliated itself to avoid seems to be coming true very quickly.

author: PC Gamer
text:
2011 was packed with iconic games: Can you guess which ones we reviewed from a quote and the score?
Even if you weren't playing them, you probably heard about them.
